evidence: GDIT operates a national network of technology innovation labs that enable rapid development, testing and fielding of advanced technologies
Several significant contract awards in the Technologies segment leverage the Digital Accelerator portfolio of solutions in cyber, AI, cloud services and digital modernization
utilizing AI/ML technologies to improve decision making, transition CENTCOM to a new cloud environment, and enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of its networks
GDIT is leveraging its AI/ML capabilities to analyze trends and patterns to determine potential anomalies in the data and detect fraud, waste and abuse
HIGLAS system processes approximately 4.5 million Medicare transactions daily and over $1.7 trillion in annual payments

limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No dollar amounts, GPU/compute scale, or quantified AI-specific budget disclosed in excerpts; named infrastructure (innovation labs, Digital Accelerators) supports score 3 but not 4+
